name: How-to-Use-the-Online-Store-V1.docx
content:
How to use the C.E. King and King Parts online stores

C.E. King operates two online stores: ceking.com for machine enquiries and information, and king.parts for purchasing spare parts, accessories, and documentation. Both stores are hosted on Shopify and accept card payments at checkout.

Details

  • ceking.com is the main website for browsing the full machine range, requesting quotes, and contacting the sales team
  • king.parts is the online spare parts store where you can browse, add to cart, and purchase parts directly
  • Both sites use Shopify checkout — you can pay by credit card, debit card, or Apple Pay / Google Pay
  • To place an order on king.parts: find your part by machine type or part number, add to cart, and proceed to checkout
  • You do not need to create an account to place an order, but creating one allows you to track order history
  • If you cannot find a part on king.parts, email support@ceking.com with your machine model, serial number, and part description
  • Prices on king.parts are displayed in GBP — currency conversion happens at checkout for international cards
  • For machine purchases (not spare parts), contact sales@ceking.com or use the website chat for a custom quotation
  • Bulk or trade orders may be eligible for special pricing — contact sales@ceking.com to discuss
  • If you experience any issues with the checkout process, contact support@ceking.com or use the website chat for assistance

Useful link:

king.parts — C.E. King Spare Parts Store
